pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh confirming 'head -25' is used to extract exactly 25 FITS files from the real WASP-12b dataset.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where FRAMES_DIR is explicitly defined and populated.
Code analysis of export_result.sh where OUTPUT_FITS is set and checked.
Code analysis of export_result.sh where OUTPUT_REPORT is set and parsed.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real dataset of WASP-12b calibrated FITS images downloaded from the University of Louisville. Exactly 25 FITS files are extracted and placed into the target directory /home/ga/AstroImages/stacking_project/frames. The resulting median stack and SNR report must be saved at the explicitly verified paths /home/ga/AstroImages/stacking_project/output/median_stack.fits and /home/ga/AstroImages/stacking_project/output/snr_report.txt.
